meaning: n.古代北欧使用的文字,诗歌
examples: And so you wear the rune always.
You said your heart is cold, smearing your tears into a mysterious rune.
Do we have plans for any changes or improvements to Dancing Rune Weapon?
The head of programming at NRK, Rune Moeklebust, described it as "slow but noble television".
Regular first choice keeper Rune Almenning Jarstein is struggling for form and fitness but is included.
